title: withStoreLock O_EXCL lockfile primitive + racer selftest (D2)
action: Per D2 (Δ1-amended): new templates/lib/lock.mjs exporting withStoreLock(root,name,fn): mkdir .bee/locks, acquire .bee/locks/<name>.lock via writeFileSync wx containing {pid,session,ts,token}; on EEXIST retry ~50ms up to 100 tries; staleness re-verified at each retry (never cached): if lock mtime older than 30s, TAKEOVER BY ATOMIC RENAME — rename(lock, lock.stale-<pid>-<ts>); exactly one renamer wins (ENOENT losers back off into the retry loop); winner unlinks the corpse then wx-acquires. NEVER unconditional unlink (spike negative control: any racer can delete the live holder fresh lock -> 7-8 winners). On timeout typed {type:refused,reason:LOCK_BUSY,holder} parsed from lock body; ALWAYS release in finally (unlink only if body token matches own). Header comment: locked sections are pure JSON RMW, milliseconds-scale, ~1000x margin under the 30s threshold — never hold the lock across a child process. Sync byte-identical to .bee/bin/lib/. scripts/test_store_lock.mjs forked-racer child-orchestrator (single spawnSync row, exit 0/1): (a) N-racer RMW counter no lost update, (b) unguarded control demonstrates loss, (c) stale takeover with N concurrent takeover attempts -> exactly one winner, (d) LOCK_BUSY timeout case. Record a deliberate-red falsifiability run. Gitignore .bee/locks/. release_manifest --write then --check. Do NOT wire callers (msh-2/3/5 own that).

truths: release only removes a lock this process acquired
no caller changes in this cell
artifacts: scripts/test_store_lock.mjs green including deliberate-red falsifiability run recorded

verify: node scripts/test_store_lock.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: withStoreLock O_EXCL lockfile primitive (D2/Δ1) landed in skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/lock.mjs + .bee/bin/lib/lock.mjs mirror: wx acquire, ~50ms x100 retry (~5s budget), staleness re-verified every retry, stale takeover by atomic rename (never unconditional unlink), typed LockBusyError naming holder, finally-release gated on pid+token match. scripts/test_store_lock.mjs forked-racer child-orchestrator covers (a) no lost update, (b) unguarded control demonstrates loss, (c) stale-takeover survives with zero mutual-exclusion violations, (d) LOCK_BUSY refusal names the real holder. No callers wired (msh-2/3/5 own that). .gitignore gained .bee/locks/; release manifest regenerated (364 files).
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["scripts/test_state_write_concurrency.mjs (child-orchestrator pattern precedent)"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": ["scripts/test_store_lock.mjs (new, 4 scenarios: no-lost-update, unguarded-control-demonstrates-loss, stale-takeover-safety, LOCK_BUSY-timeout)"],
  "red_failure_evidence": "withStoreLock is a brand-new primitive (no prior behavior to diff against a pre-change commit), so falsifiability was proven in-cycle: tryAcquire was temporarily edited to always succeed (fs.writeFileSync without the wx flag, simulating the exact fail-open unlocked write path D2 forbids), and scripts/test_store_lock.mjs went red across every scenario it touches -- '(a) locked run recorded 81 mutual-exclusion violation(s)', '(a) locked run counter total is 50, expected exactly 72 (lost update)', '(c) stale-takeover run recorded 82 mutual-exclusion violation(s)', '(c) stale-takeover run counter total is 69, expected exactly 72', '(d) busy-attempt child exited 1, expected 0' (the critical section ran even though the lock should have been busy), '(d) busy-attempt returned after only 42ms -- too fast to have exercised the real retry budget'. tryAcquire was then restored byte-identical to the wx-flagged version (confirmed via diff against skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/lock.mjs) and the suite went green again.",
  "verification_run": "node scripts/test_store_lock.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check -> PASS test_store_lock (a)/(b)/(c)/(d) all green; PASS test_lib_mirror (22 lib files + 10 hook files byte-identical); release_manifest --check: 364 file(s) match stored manifest",
  "deliberate_exceptions": []
}

PASS test_lib_mirror: internal self-test — checker correctly flags injected byte-diff, missing file, and extra file
